stories.headline: Luton-based EasyJet says possible takeover bid 'opportunistic'
stories.description: US investment firm Castlelake is considering making an offer for the budget airline.

stories.headline: How could El Nino reshape tropical storms around the world this year?
stories.description: El Nino tends to reduce hurricanes in the Atlantic while increasing storms in the Pacific Ocean.

stories.headline: Greece reopens Syrian and Afghan asylum cases, hoping for returns
stories.description: Greece’s migration minister recently said Athens does not share common values with ‘hardcore Islam’.

stories.headline: Tensions between GOP and White House over 'anti-weaponization' fund
stories.description: A standoff between the White House and the Senate remains unresolved as Republicans return to Washin...

stories.headline: What is Lebanon’s Beaufort Castle, and why has Israel captured it?
stories.description: The fortress, a historical battleground, is playing a central role in Israel’s military campaign against Hezbollah.
